## methods overview

Bot API method request-parameter schemas, generated from the spec.

Same `snake_case` boundary as {@link module:generated/types} — request params encode
`camelCase` → `snake_case` on the way out.

Added in v0.1.0

# params

## AddStickerToSetParams

Request parameters for `addStickerToSet`. Use this method to add a new sticker to a set created by the bot. Emoji sticker sets can have up to 200 stickers. Other sticker sets can have up to 120 stickers. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const AddStickerToSetParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly userId: Schema.Number
    readonly name: Schema.String
    readonly sticker: Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly sticker: Schema.String
        readonly format: Schema.Literal<"one">
        readonly emojiList: Schema.$Array<Schema.String>
        readonly maskPosition: Schema.optionalKey<
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly point: Schema.String
              readonly xShift: Schema.Number
              readonly yShift: Schema.Number
              readonly scale: Schema.Number
            }>,
            { readonly xShift: "x_shift"; readonly yShift: "y_shift" }
          >
        >
        readonly keywords: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.$Array<Schema.String>>
      }>,
      { readonly emojiList: "emoji_list"; readonly maskPosition: "mask_position" }
    >
  }>,
  { readonly userId: "user_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## AnswerCallbackQueryParams

Request parameters for `answerCallbackQuery`. Use this method to send answers to callback queries sent from inline keyboards. The answer will be displayed to the user as a notification at the top of the chat screen or as an alert. On success, True is returned.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const AnswerCallbackQueryParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly callbackQueryId: Schema.String
    readonly text: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly showAlert: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly url: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly cacheTime: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
  }>,
  { readonly callbackQueryId: "callback_query_id"; readonly showAlert: "show_alert"; readonly cacheTime: "cache_time" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## AnswerChatJoinRequestQueryParams

Request parameters for `answerChatJoinRequestQuery`. Use this method to process a received chat join request query. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const AnswerChatJoinRequestQueryParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{ readonly chatJoinRequestQueryId: Schema.String; readonly result: Schema.String }>,
  { readonly chatJoinRequestQueryId: "chat_join_request_query_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## AnswerGuestQueryParams

Request parameters for `answerGuestQuery`. Use this method to reply to a received guest message. On success, a SentGuestMessage object is returned.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const AnswerGuestQueryParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly guestQueryId: Schema.String
    readonly result: Schema.Union<
      readonly [
        Schema.encodeKeys<
          Schema.Struct<{
            readonly type: Schema.Literal<"audio">
            readonly id: Schema.String
            readonly audioFileId: Schema.String
            readonly caption: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
            readonly parseMode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
            readonly captionEntities: Schema.optionalKey<
              Schema.$Array<
                Schema.encodeKeys<
                  Schema.Struct<{
                    readonly type: Schema.String
                    readonly offset: Schema.Number
                    readonly length: Schema.Number
                    readonly url: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                    readonly user: Schema.optionalKey<
                      Schema.encodeKeys<
                        Schema.Struct<{
                          readonly id: Schema.Number
                          readonly isBot: Schema.Boolean
                          readonly firstName: Schema.String
                          readonly lastName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                          readonly username: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                          readonly languageCode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                          readonly isPremium: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly canJoinGroups: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly supportsGuestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly supportsInlineQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly canConnectToBusiness: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly hasMainWebApp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly hasTopicsEnabled: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly canManageBots: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                        }>,
                        {
                          readonly isBot: "is_bot"
                          readonly firstName: "first_name"
                          readonly lastName: "last_name"
                          readonly languageCode: "language_code"
                          readonly isPremium: "is_premium"
                          readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: "added_to_attachment_menu"
                          readonly canJoinGroups: "can_join_groups"
                          readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: "can_read_all_group_messages"
                          readonly supportsGuestQueries: "supports_guest_queries"
                          readonly supportsInlineQueries: "supports_inline_queries"
                          readonly canConnectToBusiness: "can_connect_to_business"
                          readonly hasMainWebApp: "has_main_web_app"
                          readonly hasTopicsEnabled: "has_topics_enabled"
                          readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: "allows_users_to_create_topics"
                          readonly canManageBots: "can_manage_bots"
                          readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: "supports_join_request_queries"
                        }
                      >
                    >
                    readonly language: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                    readonly customEmojiId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                    readonly unixTime: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
                    readonly dateTimeFormat: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  }>,
                  {
                    readonly customEmojiId: "custom_emoji_id"
                    readonly unixTime: "unix_time"
                    readonly dateTimeFormat: "date_time_format"
                  }
                >
              >
            >
            readonly replyMarkup: Schema.optionalKey<
              Schema.encodeKeys<
                Schema.Struct<{
                  readonly inlineKeyboard: Schema.$Array<
                    Schema.$Array<
                      Schema.encodeKeys<
                        Schema.Struct<{
                          readonly text: Schema.String
                          readonly iconCustomEmojiId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                          readonly style: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                          readonly url: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                          readonly callbackData: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                          readonly webApp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Struct<{ readonly url: Schema.String }>>
                          readonly loginUrl: Schema.optionalKey<
                            Schema.encodeKeys<
                              Schema.Struct<{
                                readonly url: Schema.Literal<"check">
                                readonly forwardText: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                                readonly botUsername: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Literal<"the">>
                                readonly requestWriteAccess: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                              }>,
                              {
                                readonly forwardText: "forward_text"
                                readonly botUsername: "bot_username"
                                readonly requestWriteAccess: "request_write_access"
                              }
                            >
                          >
                          readonly switchInlineQuery: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                          readonly switchInlineQueryCurrentChat: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                          readonly switchInlineQueryChosenChat: Schema.optionalKey<
                            Schema.encodeKeys<
                              Schema.Struct<{
                                readonly query: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                                readonly allowUserChats: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                                readonly allowBotChats: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                                readonly allowGroupChats: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                                readonly allowChannelChats: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                              }>,
                              {
                                readonly allowUserChats: "allow_user_chats"
                                readonly allowBotChats: "allow_bot_chats"
                                readonly allowGroupChats: "allow_group_chats"
                                readonly allowChannelChats: "allow_channel_chats"
                              }
                            >
                          >
                          readonly copyText: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Struct<{ readonly text: Schema.String }>>
                          readonly callbackGame: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Struct<{}>>
                          readonly pay: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                        }>,
                        {
                          readonly iconCustomEmojiId: "icon_custom_emoji_id"
                          readonly callbackData: "callback_data"
                          readonly webApp: "web_app"
                          readonly loginUrl: "login_url"
                          readonly switchInlineQuery: "switch_inline_query"
                          readonly switchInlineQueryCurrentChat: "switch_inline_query_current_chat"
                          readonly switchInlineQueryChosenChat: "switch_inline_query_chosen_chat"
                          readonly copyText: "copy_text"
                          readonly callbackGame: "callback_game"
                        }
                      >
                    >
                  >
                }>,
                { readonly inlineKeyboard: "inline_keyboard" }
              >
            >
            readonly inputMessageContent: Schema.optionalKey<
              Schema.Union<
                readonly [
                  Schema.encodeKeys<
                    Schema.Struct<{
                      readonly messageText: Schema.String
                      readonly parseMode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                      readonly entities: Schema.optionalKey<
                        Schema.$Array<
                          Schema.encodeKeys<
                            Schema.Struct<{
                              readonly type: Schema.String
                              readonly offset: Schema.Number
                              readonly length: Schema.Number
                              readonly url: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                              readonly user: Schema.optionalKey<
                                Schema.encodeKeys<
                                  Schema.Struct<{
                                    readonly id: Schema.Number
                                    readonly isBot: Schema.Boolean
                                    readonly firstName: Schema.String
                                    readonly lastName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                                    readonly username: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                                    readonly languageCode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                                    readonly isPremium: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                                    readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                                    readonly canJoinGroups: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                                    readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                                    readonly supportsGuestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                                    readonly supportsInlineQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                                    readonly canConnectToBusiness: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                                    readonly hasMainWebApp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                                    readonly hasTopicsEnabled: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                                    readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                                    readonly canManageBots: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                                    readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                                  }>,
                                  {
                                    readonly isBot: "is_bot"
                                    readonly firstName: "first_name"
                                    readonly lastName: "last_name"
                                    readonly languageCode: "language_code"
                                    readonly isPremium: "is_premium"
                                    readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: "added_to_attachment_menu"
                                    readonly canJoinGroups: "can_join_groups"
                                    readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: "can_read_all_group_messages"
                                    readonly supportsGuestQueries: "supports_guest_queries"
                                    readonly supportsInlineQueries: "supports_inline_queries"
                                    readonly canConnectToBusiness: "can_connect_to_business"
                                    readonly hasMainWebApp: "has_main_web_app"
                                    readonly hasTopicsEnabled: "has_topics_enabled"
                                    readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: "allows_users_to_create_topics"
                                    readonly canManageBots: "can_manage_bots"
                                    readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: "supports_join_request_queries"
                                  }
                                >
                              >
                              readonly language: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                              readonly customEmojiId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                              readonly unixTime: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
                              readonly dateTimeFormat: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                            }>,
                            {
                              readonly customEmojiId: "custom_emoji_id"
                              readonly unixTime: "unix_time"
                              readonly dateTimeFormat: "date_time_format"
                            }
                          >
                        >
                      >
                      readonly linkPreviewOptions: Schema.optionalKey<
                        Schema.encodeKeys<
                          Schema.Struct<{
                            readonly isDisabled: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                            readonly url: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                            readonly preferSmallMedia: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                            readonly preferLargeMedia: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                            readonly showAboveText: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                          }>,
                          {
                            readonly isDisabled: "is_disabled"
                            readonly preferSmallMedia: "prefer_small_media"
                            readonly preferLargeMedia: "prefer_large_media"
                            readonly showAboveText: "show_above_text"
                          }
                        >
                      >
                    }>,
                    {
                      readonly messageText: "message_text"
                      readonly parseMode: "parse_mode"
                      readonly linkPreviewOptions: "link_preview_options"
                    }
                  >,
                  Schema.encodeKeys<
                    Schema.Struct<{
                      readonly richMessage: Schema.encodeKeys<
                        Schema.Struct<{
                          readonly html: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>

                      readonly heading: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>

                      >
```

Added in v0.1.0

## AnswerInlineQueryParams

Request parameters for `answerInlineQuery`. Use this method to send answers to an inline query. On success, True is returned. No more than 50 results per query are allowed.

Added in v0.1.0

## AnswerPreCheckoutQueryParams

Request parameters for `answerPreCheckoutQuery`. Once the user has confirmed their payment and shipping details, the Bot API sends the final confirmation in the form of an Update with the field pre_checkout_query. Use this method to respond to such pre-checkout queries. On success, True is returned. Note: The Bot API must receive an answer within 10 seconds after the pre-checkout query was sent.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const AnswerPreCheckoutQueryParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly preCheckoutQueryId: Schema.String
    readonly ok: Schema.Boolean
    readonly errorMessage: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
  }>,
  { readonly preCheckoutQueryId: "pre_checkout_query_id"; readonly errorMessage: "error_message" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## AnswerShippingQueryParams

Request parameters for `answerShippingQuery`. If you sent an invoice requesting a shipping address and the parameter is_flexible was specified, the Bot API will send an Update with a shipping_query field to the bot. Use this method to reply to shipping queries. On success, True is returned.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const AnswerShippingQueryParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly shippingQueryId: Schema.String
    readonly ok: Schema.Boolean
    readonly shippingOptions: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.$Array<
        Schema.Struct<{
          readonly id: Schema.String
          readonly title: Schema.String
          readonly prices: Schema.$Array<
            Schema.Struct<{ readonly label: Schema.String; readonly amount: Schema.Number }>
          >
        }>
      >
    >
    readonly errorMessage: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
  }>,
  {
    readonly shippingQueryId: "shipping_query_id"
    readonly shippingOptions: "shipping_options"
    readonly errorMessage: "error_message"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## AnswerWebAppQueryParams

Added in v0.1.0

## ApproveChatJoinRequestParams

Request parameters for `approveChatJoinRequest`. Use this method to approve a chat join request. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_invite_users administrator right. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ApproveChatJoinRequestParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly userId: Schema.Number
  }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id"; readonly userId: "user_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## ApproveSuggestedPostParams

Request parameters for `approveSuggestedPost`. Use this method to approve a suggested post in a direct messages chat. The bot must have the 'can_post_messages' administrator right in the corresponding channel chat. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ApproveSuggestedPostParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Number
    readonly messageId: Schema.Number
    readonly sendDate: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
  }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id"; readonly messageId: "message_id"; readonly sendDate: "send_date" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## BanChatMemberParams

Request parameters for `banChatMember`. Use this method to ban a user in a group, a supergroup or a channel. In the case of supergroups and channels, the user will not be able to return to the chat on their own using invite links, etc., unless unbanned first. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate administrator rights. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const BanChatMemberParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly userId: Schema.Number
    readonly untilDate: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly revokeMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
  }>,
  {
    readonly chatId: "chat_id"
    readonly userId: "user_id"
    readonly untilDate: "until_date"
    readonly revokeMessages: "revoke_messages"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## BanChatSenderChatParams

Request parameters for `banChatSenderChat`. Use this method to ban a channel chat in a supergroup or a channel. Until the chat is unbanned, the owner of the banned chat won't be able to send messages on behalf of any of their channels. The bot must be an administrator in the supergroup or channel for this to work and must have the appropriate administrator rights. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const BanChatSenderChatParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly senderChatId: Schema.Number
  }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id"; readonly senderChatId: "sender_chat_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## CloseForumTopicParams

Request parameters for `closeForumTopic`. Use this method to close an open topic in a forum supergroup chat. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_topics administrator rights, unless it is the creator of the topic. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const CloseForumTopicParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly messageThreadId: Schema.Number
  }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id"; readonly messageThreadId: "message_thread_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## CloseGeneralForumTopicParams

Request parameters for `closeGeneralForumTopic`. Use this method to close an open 'General' topic in a forum supergroup chat. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_topics administrator rights. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const CloseGeneralForumTopicParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{ readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]> }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## ConvertGiftToStarsParams

Request parameters for `convertGiftToStars`. Converts a given regular gift to Telegram Stars. Requires the can_convert_gifts_to_stars business bot right. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ConvertGiftToStarsParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{ readonly businessConnectionId: Schema.String; readonly ownedGiftId: Schema.String }>,
  { readonly businessConnectionId: "business_connection_id"; readonly ownedGiftId: "owned_gift_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## CopyMessageParams

Request parameters for `copyMessage`. Use this method to copy messages of any kind. Service messages, paid media messages, giveaway messages, giveaway winners messages, and invoice messages can't be copied. A quiz poll can be copied only if the value of the field correct_option_id is known to the bot. The method is analogous to the method forwardMessage, but the copied message doesn't have a link to the original message. Returns the MessageId of the sent message on success.

**Signature**

```ts

  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>

            readonly length: Schema.Number

              Schema.encodeKeys<
                Schema.Struct<{
                  readonly id: Schema.Number
                  readonly isBot: Schema.Boolean
                  readonly firstName: Schema.String
                  readonly lastName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly username: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly languageCode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly isPremium: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canJoinGroups: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsGuestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsInlineQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canConnectToBusiness: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly hasMainWebApp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly hasTopicsEnabled: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canManageBots: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                }>,
                {
                  readonly isBot: "is_bot"
                  readonly firstName: "first_name"
                  readonly lastName: "last_name"
                  readonly languageCode: "language_code"
                  readonly isPremium: "is_premium"
                  readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: "added_to_attachment_menu"
                  readonly canJoinGroups: "can_join_groups"
                  readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: "can_read_all_group_messages"
                  readonly supportsGuestQueries: "supports_guest_queries"
                  readonly supportsInlineQueries: "supports_inline_queries"
                  readonly canConnectToBusiness: "can_connect_to_business"
                  readonly hasMainWebApp: "has_main_web_app"
                  readonly hasTopicsEnabled: "has_topics_enabled"
                  readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: "allows_users_to_create_topics"
                  readonly canManageBots: "can_manage_bots"
                  readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: "supports_join_request_queries"
                }

            readonly dateTimeFormat: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
          }>,
          {
            readonly customEmojiId: "custom_emoji_id"
            readonly unixTime: "unix_time"
            readonly dateTimeFormat: "date_time_format"
          }
        >
      >
    >
    readonly showCaptionAboveMedia: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## CopyMessagesParams

Request parameters for `copyMessages`. Use this method to copy messages of any kind. If some of the specified messages can't be found or copied, they are skipped. Service messages, paid media messages, giveaway messages, giveaway winners messages, and invoice messages can't be copied. A quiz poll can be copied only if the value of the field correct_option_id is known to the bot. The method is analogous to the method forwardMessages, but the copied messages don't have a link to the original message. Album grouping is kept for copied messages. On success, an array of MessageId of the sent messages is returned.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const CopyMessagesParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly messageThreadId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly directMessagesTopicId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly fromChatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly messageIds: Schema.$Array<Schema.Number>
    readonly disableNotification: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly protectContent: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly removeCaption: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
  }>,
  {
    readonly chatId: "chat_id"
    readonly messageThreadId: "message_thread_id"
    readonly directMessagesTopicId: "direct_messages_topic_id"
    readonly fromChatId: "from_chat_id"
    readonly messageIds: "message_ids"
    readonly disableNotification: "disable_notification"
    readonly protectContent: "protect_content"
    readonly removeCaption: "remove_caption"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## CreateChatInviteLinkParams

Request parameters for `createChatInviteLink`. Use this method to create an additional invite link for a chat. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate administrator rights. The link can be revoked using the method revokeChatInviteLink. Returns the new invite link as ChatInviteLink object.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const CreateChatInviteLinkParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly name: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly expireDate: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly memberLimit: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly createsJoinRequest: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
  }>,
  {
    readonly chatId: "chat_id"
    readonly expireDate: "expire_date"
    readonly memberLimit: "member_limit"
    readonly createsJoinRequest: "creates_join_request"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## CreateChatSubscriptionInviteLinkParams

Request parameters for `createChatSubscriptionInviteLink`. Use this method to create a subscription invite link for a channel chat. The bot must have the can_invite_users administrator rights. The link can be edited using the method editChatSubscriptionInviteLink or revoked using the method revokeChatInviteLink. Returns the new invite link as a ChatInviteLink object.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const CreateChatSubscriptionInviteLinkParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly name: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly subscriptionPeriod: Schema.Number
    readonly subscriptionPrice: Schema.Number
  }>,
  {
    readonly chatId: "chat_id"
    readonly subscriptionPeriod: "subscription_period"
    readonly subscriptionPrice: "subscription_price"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## CreateForumTopicParams

Request parameters for `createForumTopic`. Use this method to create a topic in a forum supergroup chat or a private chat with a user. In the case of a supergroup chat the bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_topics administrator right. Returns information about the created topic as a ForumTopic object.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const CreateForumTopicParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>

    readonly iconColor: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly iconCustomEmojiId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
  }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id"; readonly iconColor: "icon_color"; readonly iconCustomEmojiId: "icon_custom_emoji_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## CreateNewStickerSetParams

Request parameters for `createNewStickerSet`. Use this method to create a new sticker set owned by a user. The bot will be able to edit the sticker set thus created. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const CreateNewStickerSetParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly userId: Schema.Number
    readonly name: Schema.String
    readonly title: Schema.String
    readonly stickers: Schema.$Array<
      Schema.encodeKeys<

          readonly sticker: Schema.String
          readonly format: Schema.Literal<"one">
          readonly emojiList: Schema.$Array<Schema.String>
          readonly maskPosition: Schema.optionalKey<
            Schema.encodeKeys<
              Schema.Struct<{
                readonly point: Schema.String
                readonly xShift: Schema.Number
                readonly yShift: Schema.Number
                readonly scale: Schema.Number
              }>,
              { readonly xShift: "x_shift"; readonly yShift: "y_shift" }
            >
          >
          readonly keywords: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.$Array<Schema.String>>
        }>,
        { readonly emojiList: "emoji_list"; readonly maskPosition: "mask_position" }
      >
    >
    readonly stickerType: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly needsRepainting: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
  }>,
  { readonly userId: "user_id"; readonly stickerType: "sticker_type"; readonly needsRepainting: "needs_repainting" }
>
```

Request parameters for `deleteBusinessMessages`. Delete messages on behalf of a business account. Requires the can_delete_sent_messages business bot right to delete messages sent by the bot itself, or the can_delete_all_messages business bot right to delete any message. Returns True on success.

```ts
export declare const DeleteBusinessMessagesParams: Schema.encodeKeys<

>
```

## DeleteForumTopicParams

Request parameters for `deleteForumTopic`. Use this method to delete a forum topic along with all its messages in a forum supergroup chat or a private chat with a user. In the case of a supergroup chat the bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_delete_messages administrator rights. Returns True on success.

```ts
export declare const DeleteForumTopicParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly messageThreadId: Schema.Number
  }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id"; readonly messageThreadId: "message_thread_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## DeleteMessageParams

Request parameters for `deleteMessage`. Use this method to delete a message, including service messages, with the following limitations: - A message can only be deleted if it was sent less than 48 hours ago. - Service messages about a supergroup, channel, or forum topic creation can't be deleted. - A dice message in a private chat can only be deleted if it was sent more than 24 hours ago. - Bots can delete outgoing messages in private chats, groups, and supergroups. - Bots can delete incoming messages in private chats. - Bots granted can_post_messages permissions can delete outgoing messages in channels. - If the bot is an administrator of a group, it can delete any message there. - If the bot has can_delete_messages administrator right in a supergroup or a channel, it can delete any message there. - If the bot has can_manage_direct_messages administrator right in a channel, it can delete any message in the corresponding direct messages chat. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const DeleteMessageParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly messageId: Schema.Number
  }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id"; readonly messageId: "message_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## DeleteMessageReactionParams

Request parameters for `deleteMessageReaction`. Use this method to remove a reaction from a message in a group or a supergroup chat. The bot must have the 'can_delete_messages' administrator right in the chat. Returns True on success.

```ts
    readonly actorChatId: "actor_chat_id"
  }
>
```

## DeleteMyCommandsParams

Request parameters for `deleteMyCommands`. Use this method to delete the list of the bot's commands for the given scope and user language. After deletion, higher level commands will be shown to affected users. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const DeleteMyCommandsParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly scope: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.Union<
        readonly [
          Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"default"> }>,
          Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"all_private_chats"> }>,
          Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"all_group_chats"> }>,
          Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"all_chat_administrators"> }>,
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly type: Schema.Literal<"chat">
              readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
            }>,
            { readonly chatId: "chat_id" }
          >,
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly type: Schema.Literal<"chat_administrators">
              readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
            }>,
```

## EditChatInviteLinkParams

```ts

  }
>
```

## EditForumTopicParams

Request parameters for `editForumTopic`. Use this method to edit name and icon of a topic in a forum supergroup chat or a private chat with a user. In the case of a supergroup chat the bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_topics administrator rights, unless it is the creator of the topic. Returns True on success.

```ts
    readonly messageThreadId: "message_thread_id"

  }
>
```

## EditMessageMediaParams

Request parameters for `editMessageMedia`. Use this method to edit animation, audio, document, live photo, photo, or video messages, or to replace a text or a rich message with a media. If a message is part of a message album, then it can be edited only to an audio for audio albums, only to a document for document albums and to a photo, a live photo, or a video otherwise. When an inline message is edited, a new file can't be uploaded; use a previously uploaded file via its file_id or specify a URL. On success, if the edited message is not an inline message, the edited Message is returned, otherwise True is returned. Note that business messages that were not sent by the bot and do not contain an inline keyboard can only be edited within 48 hours from the time they were sent.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const EditMessageMediaParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly businessConnectionId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly chatId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>>
    readonly messageId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly inlineMessageId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly media: Schema.Union<
      readonly [
        Schema.encodeKeys<

```

Added in v0.1.0

## EditMessageReplyMarkupParams

Request parameters for `editMessageReplyMarkup`. Use this method to edit only the reply markup of messages. On success, if the edited message is not an inline message, the edited Message is returned, otherwise True is returned. Note that business messages that were not sent by the bot and do not contain an inline keyboard can only be edited within 48 hours from the time they were sent.

**Signature**

```ts
    readonly replyMarkup: Schema.optionalKey<

                Schema.Struct<{
                  readonly text: Schema.String

                  readonly style: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly url: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly callbackData: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly webApp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Struct<{ readonly url: Schema.String }>>
                  readonly loginUrl: Schema.optionalKey<
                    Schema.encodeKeys<
                      Schema.Struct<{
                        readonly url: Schema.Literal<"check">
                        readonly forwardText: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                        readonly botUsername: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Literal<"the">>
                        readonly requestWriteAccess: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                      }>,

                        readonly requestWriteAccess: "request_write_access"

                  readonly switchInlineQuery: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly switchInlineQueryCurrentChat: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly switchInlineQueryChosenChat: Schema.optionalKey<
                    Schema.encodeKeys<
                      Schema.Struct<{

                        readonly allowUserChats: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                        readonly allowBotChats: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                        readonly allowGroupChats: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                        readonly allowChannelChats: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                      }>,
                      {
                        readonly allowUserChats: "allow_user_chats"
                        readonly allowBotChats: "allow_bot_chats"
                        readonly allowGroupChats: "allow_group_chats"
                        readonly allowChannelChats: "allow_channel_chats"
                      }
                    >
```

## EditMessageTextParams

Request parameters for `editMessageText`. Use this method to edit text, rich and game messages. On success, if the edited message is not an inline message, the edited Message is returned, otherwise True is returned. Note that business messages that were not sent by the bot and do not contain an inline keyboard can only be edited within 48 hours from the time they were sent.

## ExportChatInviteLinkParams

Request parameters for `exportChatInviteLink`. Use this method to generate a new primary invite link for a chat; any previously generated primary link is revoked. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate administrator rights. Returns the new invite link as String on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ExportChatInviteLinkParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{ readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]> }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

Request parameters for `forwardMessage`. Use this method to forward messages of any kind. Service messages and messages with protected content can't be forwarded. On success, the sent Message is returned.

```ts
          >
          readonly sendDate: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
        }>,
        { readonly sendDate: "send_date" }
      >
    >
    readonly messageId: Schema.Number
  }>,
  {
    readonly chatId: "chat_id"
    readonly messageThreadId: "message_thread_id"
    readonly directMessagesTopicId: "direct_messages_topic_id"
    readonly fromChatId: "from_chat_id"
    readonly videoStartTimestamp: "video_start_timestamp"
    readonly disableNotification: "disable_notification"
    readonly protectContent: "protect_content"
    readonly messageEffectId: "message_effect_id"
    readonly suggestedPostParameters: "suggested_post_parameters"
    readonly messageId: "message_id"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## ForwardMessagesParams

Request parameters for `forwardMessages`. Use this method to forward multiple messages of any kind. If some of the specified messages can't be found or forwarded, they are skipped. Service messages and messages with protected content can't be forwarded. Album grouping is kept for forwarded messages. On success, an array of MessageId of the sent messages is returned.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ForwardMessagesParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly messageThreadId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly directMessagesTopicId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly fromChatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly messageIds: Schema.$Array<Schema.Number>
    readonly disableNotification: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly protectContent: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
  }>,
  {
    readonly chatId: "chat_id"
    readonly messageThreadId: "message_thread_id"
    readonly directMessagesTopicId: "direct_messages_topic_id"
    readonly fromChatId: "from_chat_id"
    readonly messageIds: "message_ids"
    readonly disableNotification: "disable_notification"
    readonly protectContent: "protect_content"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## GetFileParams

Request parameters for `getFile`. Use this method to get basic information about a file and prepare it for downloading. For the moment, bots can download files of up to 20MB in size. On success, a File object is returned. The file can then be downloaded via the link https://api.telegram.org/file/bot<token>/<file_path>, where <file_path> is taken from the response. It is guaranteed that the link will be valid for at least 1 hour. When the link expires, a new one can be requested by calling getFile again. Note: This function may not preserve the original file name and MIME type. You should save the file's MIME type and name (if available) when the File object is received.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const GetFileParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{ readonly fileId: Schema.String }>,
  { readonly fileId: "file_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## GetGameHighScoresParams

Request parameters for `getGameHighScores`. Use this method to get data for high score tables. Will return the score of the specified user and several of their neighbors in a game. Returns an Array of GameHighScore objects.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const GetGameHighScoresParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly userId: Schema.Number
    readonly chatId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly messageId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly inlineMessageId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
  }>,
  {
    readonly userId: "user_id"
    readonly chatId: "chat_id"
    readonly messageId: "message_id"
    readonly inlineMessageId: "inline_message_id"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## GetMyCommandsParams

Request parameters for `getMyCommands`. Use this method to get the current list of the bot's commands for the given scope and user language. Returns an Array of BotCommand objects. If commands aren't set, an empty list is returned.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const GetMyCommandsParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly scope: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.Union<
        readonly [
          Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"default"> }>,
          Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"all_private_chats"> }>,
          Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"all_group_chats"> }>,
          Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"all_chat_administrators"> }>,
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly type: Schema.Literal<"chat">
              readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
            }>,
            { readonly chatId: "chat_id" }
          >,
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly type: Schema.Literal<"chat_administrators">
              readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
            }>,
            { readonly chatId: "chat_id" }
          >,
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly type: Schema.Literal<"chat_member">
              readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
              readonly userId: Schema.Number
            }>,
            { readonly chatId: "chat_id"; readonly userId: "user_id" }
          >
        ]
      >
    >
    readonly languageCode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
  }>,
  { readonly languageCode: "language_code" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## GiftPremiumSubscriptionParams

Request parameters for `giftPremiumSubscription`. Gifts a Telegram Premium subscription to the given user. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const GiftPremiumSubscriptionParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly userId: Schema.Number
    readonly monthCount: Schema.Number
    readonly starCount: Schema.Number
    readonly text: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly textParseMode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly textEntities: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.$Array<
        Schema.encodeKeys<
          Schema.Struct<{
            readonly type: Schema.String
            readonly offset: Schema.Number
            readonly length: Schema.Number
            readonly url: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
            readonly user: Schema.optionalKey<
              Schema.encodeKeys<
                Schema.Struct<{
                  readonly id: Schema.Number
                  readonly isBot: Schema.Boolean
                  readonly firstName: Schema.String
                  readonly lastName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly username: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly languageCode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly isPremium: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canJoinGroups: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsGuestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsInlineQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canConnectToBusiness: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly hasMainWebApp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly hasTopicsEnabled: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canManageBots: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                }>,
                {
                  readonly isBot: "is_bot"
                  readonly firstName: "first_name"
                  readonly lastName: "last_name"
                  readonly languageCode: "language_code"
                  readonly isPremium: "is_premium"
                  readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: "added_to_attachment_menu"
                  readonly canJoinGroups: "can_join_groups"
                  readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: "can_read_all_group_messages"
                  readonly supportsGuestQueries: "supports_guest_queries"
                  readonly supportsInlineQueries: "supports_inline_queries"
                  readonly canConnectToBusiness: "can_connect_to_business"
                  readonly hasMainWebApp: "has_main_web_app"
                  readonly hasTopicsEnabled: "has_topics_enabled"
                  readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: "allows_users_to_create_topics"
                  readonly canManageBots: "can_manage_bots"
                  readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: "supports_join_request_queries"
                }
              >
            >
            readonly language: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
            readonly customEmojiId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
            readonly unixTime: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
            readonly dateTimeFormat: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
          }>,
          {
            readonly customEmojiId: "custom_emoji_id"
            readonly unixTime: "unix_time"
            readonly dateTimeFormat: "date_time_format"
          }
        >
      >
    >
  }>,
  {
    readonly userId: "user_id"
    readonly monthCount: "month_count"
    readonly starCount: "star_count"
    readonly textParseMode: "text_parse_mode"
    readonly textEntities: "text_entities"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## HideGeneralForumTopicParams

Request parameters for `hideGeneralForumTopic`. Use this method to hide the 'General' topic in a forum supergroup chat. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_topics administrator rights. The topic will be automatically closed if it was open. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const HideGeneralForumTopicParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{ readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]> }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

Added in v0.1.0

## PinChatMessageParams

Request parameters for `pinChatMessage`. Use this method to add a message to the list of pinned messages in a chat. In private chats and channel direct messages chats, all non-service messages can be pinned. Conversely, the bot must be an administrator with the 'can_pin_messages' right or the 'can_edit_messages' right to pin messages in groups and channels respectively. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const PinChatMessageParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly businessConnectionId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly messageId: Schema.Number
    readonly disableNotification: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
  }>,
  {
    readonly businessConnectionId: "business_connection_id"
    readonly chatId: "chat_id"
    readonly messageId: "message_id"
    readonly disableNotification: "disable_notification"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## PostStoryParams

Request parameters for `postStory`. Posts a story on behalf of a managed business account. Requires the can_manage_stories business bot right. Returns Story on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const PostStoryParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly businessConnectionId: Schema.String
    readonly content: Schema.Union<
      readonly [
        Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"photo">; readonly photo: Schema.Literal<"of"> }>,
        Schema.encodeKeys<
          Schema.Struct<{
            readonly type: Schema.Literal<"video">
            readonly video: Schema.Literal<"of">
            readonly duration: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
            readonly coverFrameTimestamp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
            readonly isAnimation: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
          }>,
          { readonly coverFrameTimestamp: "cover_frame_timestamp"; readonly isAnimation: "is_animation" }
        >
      ]
    >
    readonly activePeriod: Schema.Number
    readonly caption: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly parseMode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly captionEntities: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.$Array<
        Schema.encodeKeys<
          Schema.Struct<{
            readonly type: Schema.String
            readonly offset: Schema.Number
            readonly length: Schema.Number
            readonly url: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
            readonly user: Schema.optionalKey<
              Schema.encodeKeys<
                Schema.Struct<{
                  readonly id: Schema.Number
                  readonly isBot: Schema.Boolean
                  readonly firstName: Schema.String
                  readonly lastName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly username: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly languageCode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly isPremium: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canJoinGroups: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsGuestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsInlineQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canConnectToBusiness: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly hasMainWebApp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly hasTopicsEnabled: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canManageBots: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                }>,
                {
                  readonly isBot: "is_bot"
                  readonly firstName: "first_name"
                  readonly lastName: "last_name"
                  readonly languageCode: "language_code"
                  readonly isPremium: "is_premium"
                  readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: "added_to_attachment_menu"
                  readonly canJoinGroups: "can_join_groups"
                  readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: "can_read_all_group_messages"
                  readonly supportsGuestQueries: "supports_guest_queries"
                  readonly supportsInlineQueries: "supports_inline_queries"
                  readonly canConnectToBusiness: "can_connect_to_business"
                  readonly hasMainWebApp: "has_main_web_app"
                  readonly hasTopicsEnabled: "has_topics_enabled"
                  readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: "allows_users_to_create_topics"
                  readonly canManageBots: "can_manage_bots"
                  readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: "supports_join_request_queries"
                }
              >
            >
            readonly language: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
            readonly customEmojiId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
            readonly unixTime: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
            readonly dateTimeFormat: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
          }>,
          {
            readonly customEmojiId: "custom_emoji_id"
            readonly unixTime: "unix_time"
            readonly dateTimeFormat: "date_time_format"
          }
        >
      >
    >
    readonly areas: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.$Array<
        Schema.Struct<{
          readonly position: Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly xPercentage: Schema.Number
              readonly yPercentage: Schema.Number
              readonly widthPercentage: Schema.Number
              readonly heightPercentage: Schema.Number
              readonly rotationAngle: Schema.Number
              readonly cornerRadiusPercentage: Schema.Number
            }>,
            {
              readonly xPercentage: "x_percentage"
              readonly yPercentage: "y_percentage"
              readonly widthPercentage: "width_percentage"
              readonly heightPercentage: "height_percentage"
              readonly rotationAngle: "rotation_angle"
              readonly cornerRadiusPercentage: "corner_radius_percentage"
            }
          >
          readonly type: Schema.Union<
            readonly [
              Schema.Struct<{
                readonly type: Schema.Literal<"location">
                readonly latitude: Schema.Number
                readonly longitude: Schema.Number
                readonly address: Schema.optionalKey<
                  Schema.encodeKeys<
                    Schema.Struct<{
                      readonly countryCode: Schema.String
                      readonly state: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                      readonly city: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                      readonly street: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                    }>,
                    { readonly countryCode: "country_code" }
                  >
                >
              }>,
              Schema.encodeKeys<
                Schema.Struct<{
                  readonly type: Schema.Literal<"suggested_reaction">
                  readonly reactionType: Schema.Union<
                    readonly [
                      Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"emoji">; readonly emoji: Schema.String }>,
                      Schema.encodeKeys<
                        Schema.Struct<{
                          readonly type: Schema.Literal<"custom_emoji">
                          readonly customEmojiId: Schema.String
                        }>,
                        { readonly customEmojiId: "custom_emoji_id" }
                      >,
                      Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"paid"> }>
                    ]
                  >
                  readonly isDark: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly isFlipped: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                }>,
                { readonly reactionType: "reaction_type"; readonly isDark: "is_dark"; readonly isFlipped: "is_flipped" }
              >,
              Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"link">; readonly url: Schema.String }>,
              Schema.encodeKeys<
                Schema.Struct<{
                  readonly type: Schema.Literal<"weather">
                  readonly temperature: Schema.Number
                  readonly emoji: Schema.String
                  readonly backgroundColor: Schema.Number
                }>,
                { readonly backgroundColor: "background_color" }
              >,
              Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"unique_gift">; readonly name: Schema.String }>
            ]
          >
        }>
      >
    >
    readonly postToChatPage: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly protectContent: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
  }>,
  {
    readonly businessConnectionId: "business_connection_id"
    readonly activePeriod: "active_period"
    readonly parseMode: "parse_mode"
    readonly captionEntities: "caption_entities"
    readonly postToChatPage: "post_to_chat_page"
    readonly protectContent: "protect_content"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## PromoteChatMemberParams

Request parameters for `promoteChatMember`. Use this method to promote or demote a user in a supergroup or a channel. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate administrator rights. Pass False for all boolean parameters to demote a user. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const PromoteChatMemberParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly userId: Schema.Number
    readonly isAnonymous: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly canManageChat: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly canDeleteMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly canManageVideoChats: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly canRestrictMembers: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly canPromoteMembers: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly canChangeInfo: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly canInviteUsers: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly canPostStories: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly canEditStories: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly canDeleteStories: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly canPostMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly canEditMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly canPinMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly canManageTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly canManageDirectMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly canManageTags: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
  }>,
  {
    readonly chatId: "chat_id"
    readonly userId: "user_id"
    readonly isAnonymous: "is_anonymous"
    readonly canManageChat: "can_manage_chat"
    readonly canDeleteMessages: "can_delete_messages"
    readonly canManageVideoChats: "can_manage_video_chats"
    readonly canRestrictMembers: "can_restrict_members"
    readonly canPromoteMembers: "can_promote_members"
    readonly canChangeInfo: "can_change_info"
    readonly canInviteUsers: "can_invite_users"
    readonly canPostStories: "can_post_stories"
    readonly canEditStories: "can_edit_stories"
    readonly canDeleteStories: "can_delete_stories"
    readonly canPostMessages: "can_post_messages"
    readonly canEditMessages: "can_edit_messages"
    readonly canPinMessages: "can_pin_messages"
    readonly canManageTopics: "can_manage_topics"
    readonly canManageDirectMessages: "can_manage_direct_messages"
    readonly canManageTags: "can_manage_tags"
  }
>
```

## ReopenForumTopicParams

Request parameters for `reopenForumTopic`. Use this method to reopen a closed topic in a forum supergroup chat. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_topics administrator rights, unless it is the creator of the topic. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ReopenForumTopicParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly messageThreadId: Schema.Number
  }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id"; readonly messageThreadId: "message_thread_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## ReopenGeneralForumTopicParams

Request parameters for `reopenGeneralForumTopic`. Use this method to reopen a closed 'General' topic in a forum supergroup chat. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_topics administrator rights. The topic will be automatically unhidden if it was hidden. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ReopenGeneralForumTopicParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{ readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]> }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## ReplaceManagedBotTokenParams

Request parameters for `replaceManagedBotToken`. Use this method to revoke the current token of a managed bot and generate a new one. Returns the new token as String on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ReplaceManagedBotTokenParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{ readonly userId: Schema.Number }>,
  { readonly userId: "user_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## ReplaceStickerInSetParams

Request parameters for `replaceStickerInSet`. Use this method to replace an existing sticker in a sticker set with a new one. The method is equivalent to calling deleteStickerFromSet, then addStickerToSet, then setStickerPositionInSet. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const ReplaceStickerInSetParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly userId: Schema.Number
    readonly name: Schema.String
    readonly oldSticker: Schema.String
    readonly sticker: Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly sticker: Schema.String
        readonly format: Schema.Literal<"one">
        readonly emojiList: Schema.$Array<Schema.String>
        readonly maskPosition: Schema.optionalKey<
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly point: Schema.String
              readonly xShift: Schema.Number
              readonly yShift: Schema.Number
              readonly scale: Schema.Number
            }>,
            { readonly xShift: "x_shift"; readonly yShift: "y_shift" }
          >
        >
        readonly keywords: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.$Array<Schema.String>>
      }>,
      { readonly emojiList: "emoji_list"; readonly maskPosition: "mask_position" }
    >
  }>,
  { readonly userId: "user_id"; readonly oldSticker: "old_sticker" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## RepostStoryParams

Request parameters for `repostStory`. Reposts a story on behalf of a business account from another business account. Both business accounts must be managed by the same bot, and the story on the source account must have been posted (or reposted) by the bot. Requires the can_manage_stories business bot right for both business accounts. Returns Story on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const RepostStoryParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly businessConnectionId: Schema.String
    readonly fromChatId: Schema.Number
    readonly fromStoryId: Schema.Number
    readonly activePeriod: Schema.Number
    readonly postToChatPage: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly protectContent: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
  }>,
  {
    readonly businessConnectionId: "business_connection_id"
    readonly fromChatId: "from_chat_id"
    readonly fromStoryId: "from_story_id"
    readonly activePeriod: "active_period"
    readonly postToChatPage: "post_to_chat_page"
    readonly protectContent: "protect_content"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## RestrictChatMemberParams

Request parameters for `restrictChatMember`. Use this method to restrict a user in a supergroup. The bot must be an administrator in the supergroup for this to work and must have the appropriate administrator rights. Pass True for all permissions to lift restrictions from a user. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const RestrictChatMemberParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly userId: Schema.Number
    readonly permissions: Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly canSendMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canSendAudios: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canSendDocuments: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canSendPhotos: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canSendVideos: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canSendVideoNotes: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canSendVoiceNotes: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canSendPolls: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canSendOtherMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canAddWebPagePreviews: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canReactToMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canEditTag: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canChangeInfo: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canInviteUsers: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canPinMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canManageTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      }>,
      {
        readonly canSendMessages: "can_send_messages"
        readonly canSendAudios: "can_send_audios"
        readonly canSendDocuments: "can_send_documents"
        readonly canSendPhotos: "can_send_photos"
        readonly canSendVideos: "can_send_videos"
        readonly canSendVideoNotes: "can_send_video_notes"
        readonly canSendVoiceNotes: "can_send_voice_notes"
        readonly canSendPolls: "can_send_polls"
        readonly canSendOtherMessages: "can_send_other_messages"
        readonly canAddWebPagePreviews: "can_add_web_page_previews"
        readonly canReactToMessages: "can_react_to_messages"
        readonly canEditTag: "can_edit_tag"
        readonly canChangeInfo: "can_change_info"
        readonly canInviteUsers: "can_invite_users"
        readonly canPinMessages: "can_pin_messages"
        readonly canManageTopics: "can_manage_topics"
      }
    >
    readonly useIndependentChatPermissions: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly untilDate: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
  }>,
  {
    readonly chatId: "chat_id"
    readonly userId: "user_id"
    readonly useIndependentChatPermissions: "use_independent_chat_permissions"
    readonly untilDate: "until_date"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## RevokeChatInviteLinkParams

Request parameters for `revokeChatInviteLink`. Use this method to revoke an invite link created by the bot. If the primary link is revoked, a new link is automatically generated. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate administrator rights. Returns the revoked invite link as ChatInviteLink object.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const RevokeChatInviteLinkParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly inviteLink: Schema.String
  }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id"; readonly inviteLink: "invite_link" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## SendAnimationParams

Request parameters for `sendAnimation`. Use this method to send animation files (GIF or H.264/MPEG-4 AVC video without sound). On success, the sent Message is returned. Bots can currently send animation files of up to 50 MB in size, this limit may be changed in the future.

Added in v0.1.0

## SendAudioParams

Request parameters for `sendAudio`. Use this method to send audio files, if you want Telegram clients to display them in the music player. Your audio must be in the .MP3 or .M4A format. On success, the sent Message is returned. Bots can currently send audio files of up to 50 MB in size, this limit may be changed in the future. For sending voice messages, use the sendVoice method instead.

```ts
            { readonly forceReply: "force_reply"; readonly inputFieldPlaceholder: "input_field_placeholder" }
          >
        ]
      >
    >
  }>,

    readonly chatId: "chat_id"
    readonly messageThreadId: "message_thread_id"
    readonly directMessagesTopicId: "direct_messages_topic_id"
    readonly parseMode: "parse_mode"
    readonly captionEntities: "caption_entities"
    readonly disableNotification: "disable_notification"
    readonly protectContent: "protect_content"
    readonly allowPaidBroadcast: "allow_paid_broadcast"
    readonly messageEffectId: "message_effect_id"
    readonly suggestedPostParameters: "suggested_post_parameters"
    readonly replyParameters: "reply_parameters"
    readonly replyMarkup: "reply_markup"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## SendChatActionParams

Request parameters for `sendChatAction`. Use this method when you need to tell the user that something is happening on the bot's side. The status is set for 5 seconds or less (when a message arrives from your bot, Telegram clients clear its typing status). Returns True on success. We only recommend using this method when a response from the bot will take a noticeable amount of time to arrive.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const SendChatActionParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly businessConnectionId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly messageThreadId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly action: Schema.String
  }>,
  {
    readonly businessConnectionId: "business_connection_id"
    readonly chatId: "chat_id"
    readonly messageThreadId: "message_thread_id"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## SendChatJoinRequestWebAppParams

Request parameters for `sendChatJoinRequestWebApp`. Use this method to process a received chat join request query by showing a Mini App to the user before deciding the outcome. Call answerChatJoinRequestQuery to resolve the join request query based on the user interaction with the Mini App. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const SendChatJoinRequestWebAppParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{ readonly chatJoinRequestQueryId: Schema.String; readonly webAppUrl: Schema.String }>,
  { readonly chatJoinRequestQueryId: "chat_join_request_query_id"; readonly webAppUrl: "web_app_url" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## SendDocumentParams

Request parameters for `sendDocument`. Use this method to send general files. On success, the sent Message is returned. Bots can currently send files of any type of up to 50 MB in size, this limit may be changed in the future.

## SendGiftParams

Request parameters for `sendGift`. Sends a gift to the given user or channel chat. The gift can't be converted to Telegram Stars by the receiver. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const SendGiftParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly userId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>

              Schema.encodeKeys<
                Schema.Struct<{
                  readonly id: Schema.Number
                  readonly isBot: Schema.Boolean
                  readonly firstName: Schema.String
                  readonly lastName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly username: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly languageCode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly isPremium: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canJoinGroups: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsGuestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsInlineQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canConnectToBusiness: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly hasMainWebApp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly hasTopicsEnabled: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canManageBots: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                }>,
                {
                  readonly isBot: "is_bot"
```

## SendMediaGroupParams

Request parameters for `sendMediaGroup`. Use this method to send a group of photos, live photos, videos, documents or audios as an album. Documents and audio files can be only grouped in an album with messages of the same type. On success, an array of Message objects that were sent is returned.

**Signature**

