Added in v0.1.0

## SendMessageDraftParams

Request parameters for `sendMessageDraft`. Use this method to stream a partial message to a user while the message is being generated. Note that the streamed draft is ephemeral and acts as a temporary 30-second preview - once the output is finalized, you must call sendMessage with the complete message to persist it in the user's chat. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const SendMessageDraftParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Number
    readonly messageThreadId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly draftId: Schema.Number
    readonly text: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly parseMode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly entities: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.$Array<
        Schema.encodeKeys<
          Schema.Struct<{
            readonly type: Schema.String

            readonly length: Schema.Number
            readonly url: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>

              Schema.encodeKeys<

                  readonly id: Schema.Number

                  readonly firstName: Schema.String
                  readonly lastName: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly username: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly languageCode: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
                  readonly isPremium: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canJoinGroups: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsGuestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsInlineQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canConnectToBusiness: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly hasMainWebApp: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly hasTopicsEnabled: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly allowsUsersToCreateTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly canManageBots: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                  readonly supportsJoinRequestQueries: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
                }>,
                {
                  readonly isBot: "is_bot"
                  readonly firstName: "first_name"
                  readonly lastName: "last_name"
                  readonly languageCode: "language_code"
                  readonly isPremium: "is_premium"
                  readonly addedToAttachmentMenu: "added_to_attachment_menu"
                  readonly canJoinGroups: "can_join_groups"
                  readonly canReadAllGroupMessages: "can_read_all_group_messages"
                  readonly supportsGuestQueries: "supports_guest_queries"
                  readonly supportsInlineQueries: "supports_inline_queries"

    readonly chatId: "chat_id"
```

Added in v0.1.0

## SendPaidMediaParams

Added in v0.1.0

## SendPhotoParams

Request parameters for `sendPhoto`. Use this method to send photos. On success, the sent Message is returned.

Added in v0.1.0

## SendPollParams

Request parameters for `sendPoll`. Use this method to send a native poll. On success, the sent Message is returned.

Added in v0.1.0

## SendRichMessageDraftParams

Request parameters for `sendRichMessageDraft`. Use this method to stream a partial rich message to a user while the message is being generated. Note that the streamed draft is ephemeral and acts as a temporary 30-second preview - once the output is finalized, you must call sendRichMessage with the complete message to persist it in the user's chat. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const SendRichMessageDraftParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Number
    readonly messageThreadId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly draftId: Schema.Number
    readonly richMessage: Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly html: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
        readonly markdown: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
        readonly isRtl: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly skipEntityDetection: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      }>,
      { readonly isRtl: "is_rtl"; readonly skipEntityDetection: "skip_entity_detection" }
    >
  }>,
  {
    readonly chatId: "chat_id"
    readonly messageThreadId: "message_thread_id"
    readonly draftId: "draft_id"
    readonly richMessage: "rich_message"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## SendRichMessageParams

Request parameters for `sendRichMessage`. Use this method to send rich messages. If the message contains a block with a media element, then the bot must have the right to send the media to the chat. On success, the sent Message is returned.

Added in v0.1.0

## SendVideoNoteParams

Request parameters for `sendVideoNote`. As of v.4.0, Telegram clients support rounded square MPEG4 videos of up to 1 minute long. Use this method to send video messages. On success, the sent Message is returned.

Added in v0.1.0

## SendVideoParams

Request parameters for `sendVideo`. Use this method to send video files, Telegram clients support MPEG4 videos (other formats may be sent as Document). On success, the sent Message is returned. Bots can currently send video files of up to 50 MB in size, this limit may be changed in the future.

Added in v0.1.0

## SendVoiceParams

Request parameters for `sendVoice`. Use this method to send audio files, if you want Telegram clients to display the file as a playable voice message. For this to work, your audio must be in an .OGG file encoded with OPUS, or in .MP3 format, or in .M4A format (other formats may be sent as Audio or Document). On success, the sent Message is returned. Bots can currently send voice messages of up to 50 MB in size, this limit may be changed in the future.

**Signature**

```ts

  Schema.Struct<{

                  readonly hasTopicsEnabled: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## SetBusinessAccountBioParams

Request parameters for `setBusinessAccountBio`. Changes the bio of a managed business account. Requires the can_change_bio business bot right. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const SetBusinessAccountBioParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{ readonly businessConnectionId: Schema.String; readonly bio: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String> }>,
  { readonly businessConnectionId: "business_connection_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## SetBusinessAccountGiftSettingsParams

Request parameters for `setBusinessAccountGiftSettings`. Changes the privacy settings pertaining to incoming gifts in a managed business account. Requires the can_change_gift_settings business bot right. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const SetBusinessAccountGiftSettingsParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly businessConnectionId: Schema.String
    readonly showGiftButton: Schema.Boolean
    readonly acceptedGiftTypes: Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly unlimitedGifts: Schema.Boolean
        readonly limitedGifts: Schema.Boolean
        readonly uniqueGifts: Schema.Boolean
        readonly premiumSubscription: Schema.Boolean
        readonly giftsFromChannels: Schema.Boolean
      }>,
      {
        readonly unlimitedGifts: "unlimited_gifts"
        readonly limitedGifts: "limited_gifts"
        readonly uniqueGifts: "unique_gifts"
        readonly premiumSubscription: "premium_subscription"
        readonly giftsFromChannels: "gifts_from_channels"
      }
    >
  }>,
  {
    readonly businessConnectionId: "business_connection_id"
    readonly showGiftButton: "show_gift_button"
    readonly acceptedGiftTypes: "accepted_gift_types"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## SetBusinessAccountNameParams

Request parameters for `setBusinessAccountName`. Changes the first and last name of a managed business account. Requires the can_change_name business bot right. Returns True on success.

```ts
export declare const SetBusinessAccountNameParams: Schema.encodeKeys<

    readonly businessConnectionId: Schema.String

    readonly firstName: "first_name"
    readonly lastName: "last_name"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## SetBusinessAccountProfilePhotoParams

Request parameters for `setBusinessAccountProfilePhoto`. Changes the profile photo of a managed business account. Requires the can_edit_profile_photo business bot right. Returns True on success.

```ts
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

Added in v0.1.0

## SetChatAdministratorCustomTitleParams

Request parameters for `setChatAdministratorCustomTitle`. Use this method to set a custom title for an administrator in a supergroup promoted by the bot. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const SetChatAdministratorCustomTitleParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly userId: Schema.Number
    readonly customTitle: Schema.String
  }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id"; readonly userId: "user_id"; readonly customTitle: "custom_title" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## SetChatDescriptionParams

Request parameters for `setChatDescription`. Use this method to change the description of a group, a supergroup or a channel. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the appropriate administrator rights. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const SetChatDescriptionParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly description: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
  }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## SetChatMemberTagParams

Request parameters for `setChatMemberTag`. Use this method to set a tag for a regular member in a group or a supergroup. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_tags administrator right. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const SetChatMemberTagParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly userId: Schema.Number
    readonly tag: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
  }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id"; readonly userId: "user_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## SetChatMenuButtonParams

Request parameters for `setChatMenuButton`. Use this method to change the bot's menu button in a private chat, or the default menu button. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const SetChatMenuButtonParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly menuButton: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.Union<
        readonly [
          Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"commands"> }>,
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly type: Schema.Literal<"web_app">
              readonly text: Schema.String
              readonly webApp: Schema.Struct<{ readonly url: Schema.String }>
            }>,
            { readonly webApp: "web_app" }
          >,
          Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"default"> }>
        ]
      >
    >
  }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id"; readonly menuButton: "menu_button" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## SetChatPermissionsParams

Request parameters for `setChatPermissions`. Use this method to set default chat permissions for all members. The bot must be an administrator in the group or a supergroup for this to work and must have the can_restrict_members administrator rights. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const SetChatPermissionsParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly permissions: Schema.encodeKeys<
      Schema.Struct<{
        readonly canSendMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>

        readonly canEditTag: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canChangeInfo: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canInviteUsers: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canPinMessages: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
        readonly canManageTopics: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
      }>,
      {
        readonly canSendMessages: "can_send_messages"
        readonly canSendAudios: "can_send_audios"
        readonly canSendDocuments: "can_send_documents"
        readonly canSendPhotos: "can_send_photos"
        readonly canSendVideos: "can_send_videos"
        readonly canSendVideoNotes: "can_send_video_notes"
        readonly canSendVoiceNotes: "can_send_voice_notes"
        readonly canSendPolls: "can_send_polls"
        readonly canSendOtherMessages: "can_send_other_messages"
        readonly canAddWebPagePreviews: "can_add_web_page_previews"
        readonly canReactToMessages: "can_react_to_messages"
        readonly canEditTag: "can_edit_tag"
        readonly canChangeInfo: "can_change_info"
        readonly canInviteUsers: "can_invite_users"
        readonly canPinMessages: "can_pin_messages"
```

## SetMessageReactionParams

Request parameters for `setMessageReaction`. Use this method to change the chosen reactions on a message. Service messages of some types can't be reacted to. Automatically forwarded messages from a channel to its discussion group have the same available reactions as messages in the channel. Bots can't use paid reactions. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts

  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly messageId: Schema.Number
    readonly reaction: Schema.optionalKey<
      Schema.$Array<

          readonly [
            Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"emoji">; readonly emoji: Schema.String }>,
            Schema.encodeKeys<
              Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"custom_emoji">; readonly customEmojiId: Schema.String }>,
              { readonly customEmojiId: "custom_emoji_id" }
            >,
            Schema.Struct<{ readonly type: Schema.Literal<"paid"> }>
          ]
        >
      >
    >
    readonly isBig: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
  }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id"; readonly messageId: "message_id"; readonly isBig: "is_big" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## SetPassportDataErrorsParams

Request parameters for `setPassportDataErrors`. Informs a user that some of the Telegram Passport elements they provided contains errors. The user will not be able to re-submit their Passport to you until the errors are fixed (the contents of the field for which you returned the error must change). Returns True on success. Use this if the data submitted by the user doesn't satisfy the standards your service requires for any reason. For example, if a birthday date seems invalid, a submitted document is blurry, a scan shows evidence of tampering, etc. Supply some details in the error message to make sure the user knows how to correct the issues.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const SetPassportDataErrorsParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly userId: Schema.Number
    readonly errors: Schema.$Array<
      Schema.Union<
        readonly [
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly source: Schema.Literal<"data">
              readonly type: Schema.String
              readonly fieldName: Schema.String
              readonly dataHash: Schema.String
              readonly message: Schema.String
            }>,
            { readonly fieldName: "field_name"; readonly dataHash: "data_hash" }
          >,
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly source: Schema.Literal<"front_side">
              readonly type: Schema.String
              readonly fileHash: Schema.String
              readonly message: Schema.String
            }>,
            { readonly fileHash: "file_hash" }
          >,
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly source: Schema.Literal<"reverse_side">
              readonly type: Schema.String
              readonly fileHash: Schema.String
              readonly message: Schema.String
            }>,
            { readonly fileHash: "file_hash" }
          >,
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly source: Schema.Literal<"selfie">
              readonly type: Schema.String
              readonly fileHash: Schema.String
              readonly message: Schema.String
            }>,
            { readonly fileHash: "file_hash" }
          >,
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly source: Schema.Literal<"file">
              readonly type: Schema.String
              readonly fileHash: Schema.String
              readonly message: Schema.String
            }>,
            { readonly fileHash: "file_hash" }
          >,
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly source: Schema.Literal<"files">
              readonly type: Schema.String
              readonly fileHashes: Schema.$Array<Schema.String>
              readonly message: Schema.String
            }>,
            { readonly fileHashes: "file_hashes" }
          >,
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly source: Schema.Literal<"translation_file">
              readonly type: Schema.String
              readonly fileHash: Schema.String
              readonly message: Schema.String
            }>,
            { readonly fileHash: "file_hash" }
          >,
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly source: Schema.Literal<"translation_files">
              readonly type: Schema.String
              readonly fileHashes: Schema.$Array<Schema.String>
              readonly message: Schema.String
            }>,
            { readonly fileHashes: "file_hashes" }
          >,
          Schema.encodeKeys<
            Schema.Struct<{
              readonly source: Schema.Literal<"unspecified">
              readonly type: Schema.String
              readonly elementHash: Schema.String
              readonly message: Schema.String
            }>,
            { readonly elementHash: "element_hash" }
          >
        ]
      >
    >
  }>,
  { readonly userId: "user_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## SetWebhookParams

Request parameters for `setWebhook`. Use this method to specify a URL and receive incoming updates via an outgoing webhook. Whenever there is an update for the bot, we will send an HTTPS POST request to the specified URL, containing a JSON-serialized Update. In case of an unsuccessful request (a request with response HTTP status code different from 2XY), we will repeat the request and give up after a reasonable amount of attempts. Returns True on success. If you'd like to make sure that the webhook was set by you, you can specify secret data in the parameter secret_token. If specified, the request will contain a header "X-Telegram-Bot-Api-Secret-Token" with the secret token as content.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const SetWebhookParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly url: Schema.String
    readonly certificate: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Unknown>
    readonly ipAddress: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly maxConnections: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
    readonly allowedUpdates: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.$Array<Schema.String>>
    readonly dropPendingUpdates: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
    readonly secretToken: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
  }>,
  {
    readonly ipAddress: "ip_address"
    readonly maxConnections: "max_connections"
    readonly allowedUpdates: "allowed_updates"
    readonly dropPendingUpdates: "drop_pending_updates"
    readonly secretToken: "secret_token"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

```ts
          >

      >
    >

    readonly messageId: "message_id"

>
```

```ts
                  readonly copyText: "copy_text"
                  readonly callbackGame: "callback_game"
                }
              >
            >
          >
        }>,
        { readonly inlineKeyboard: "inline_keyboard" }
      >
    >
  }>,
  {
    readonly businessConnectionId: "business_connection_id"
    readonly chatId: "chat_id"
    readonly messageId: "message_id"
    readonly replyMarkup: "reply_markup"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## TransferBusinessAccountStarsParams

## TransferGiftParams

Request parameters for `transferGift`. Transfers an owned unique gift to another user. Requires the can_transfer_and_upgrade_gifts business bot right. Requires can_transfer_stars business bot right if the transfer is paid. Returns True on success.

```ts
    readonly newOwnerChatId: "new_owner_chat_id"
    readonly starCount: "star_count"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## UnbanChatMemberParams

Request parameters for `unbanChatMember`. Use this method to unban a previously banned user in a supergroup or channel. The user will not return to the group or channel automatically, but will be able to join via link, etc. The bot must be an administrator for this to work. By default, this method guarantees that after the call the user is not a member of the chat, but will be able to join it. So if the user is a member of the chat they will also be removed from the chat. If you don't want this, use the parameter only_if_banned. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const UnbanChatMemberParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly userId: Schema.Number
    readonly onlyIfBanned: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Boolean>
  }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id"; readonly userId: "user_id"; readonly onlyIfBanned: "only_if_banned" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## UnbanChatSenderChatParams

Request parameters for `unbanChatSenderChat`. Use this method to unban a previously banned channel chat in a supergroup or channel. The bot must be an administrator for this to work and must have the appropriate administrator rights. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const UnbanChatSenderChatParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly senderChatId: Schema.Number
  }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id"; readonly senderChatId: "sender_chat_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## UnhideGeneralForumTopicParams

Request parameters for `unhideGeneralForumTopic`. Use this method to unhide the 'General' topic in a forum supergroup chat. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_manage_topics administrator rights. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const UnhideGeneralForumTopicParams: Schema.encodeKeys<

  { readonly chatId: "chat_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## UnpinAllChatMessagesParams

Request parameters for `unpinAllChatMessages`. Use this method to clear the list of pinned messages in a chat. In private chats and channel direct messages chats, no additional rights are required to unpin all pinned messages. Conversely, the bot must be an administrator with the 'can_pin_messages' right or the 'can_edit_messages' right to unpin all pinned messages in groups and channels respectively. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const UnpinAllChatMessagesParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{ readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]> }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## UnpinAllForumTopicMessagesParams

Request parameters for `unpinAllForumTopicMessages`. Use this method to clear the list of pinned messages in a forum topic in a forum supergroup chat or a private chat with a user. In the case of a supergroup chat the bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_pin_messages administrator right in the supergroup. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const UnpinAllForumTopicMessagesParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly messageThreadId: Schema.Number
  }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id"; readonly messageThreadId: "message_thread_id" }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## UnpinAllGeneralForumTopicMessagesParams

Request parameters for `unpinAllGeneralForumTopicMessages`. Use this method to clear the list of pinned messages in a General forum topic. The bot must be an administrator in the chat for this to work and must have the can_pin_messages administrator right in the supergroup. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const UnpinAllGeneralForumTopicMessagesParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{ readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]> }>,
  { readonly chatId: "chat_id" }
>
```

## UnpinChatMessageParams

Request parameters for `unpinChatMessage`. Use this method to remove a message from the list of pinned messages in a chat. In private chats and channel direct messages chats, all messages can be unpinned. Conversely, the bot must be an administrator with the 'can_pin_messages' right or the 'can_edit_messages' right to unpin messages in groups and channels respectively. Returns True on success.

**Signature**

```ts
export declare const UnpinChatMessageParams: Schema.encodeKeys<
  Schema.Struct<{
    readonly businessConnectionId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.String>
    readonly chatId: Schema.Union<readonly [Schema.Number, Schema.String]>
    readonly messageId: Schema.optionalKey<Schema.Number>
  }>,
  {
    readonly businessConnectionId: "business_connection_id"
    readonly chatId: "chat_id"
    readonly messageId: "message_id"
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

## UpgradeGiftParams

Request parameters for `upgradeGift`. Upgrades a given regular gift to a unique gift. Requires the can_transfer_and_upgrade_gifts business bot right. Additionally requires the can_transfer_stars business bot right if the upgrade is paid. Returns True on success.

```ts
  }
>
```

Added in v0.1.0

```ts
>
```
